name: Oatmeal Lace Cookies # 2
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Dark brown sugar; firmly packed
1/2 cup Butter; melted. Do not use margarine
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Finely blend the oatmeal in a blender or food processor until it resembles flour.
3. Add the brown sugar, egg, vanilla, salt, and melted butter to the oatmeal mixture. Mix well until you have a thick, dark brown batter.
4. Drop teaspoonfuls of batter onto a buttered cookie sheet, spacing them 2-3 inches apart. The cookies will spread into large, thin circles while baking.
5. Bake for 12 minutes. Remove cookies with a spatula while they are still warm.
6. Allow cookies to cool completely before storing in a tightly covered container.
Note: If the cooled cookies become hard and sticky, place them back in a warm oven for a few seconds until they soften enough to remove.
